Title: Unearthed Arcana 2022: Character Origins
Contents: First official One D&D UA; revises character creation with new/updated species, backgrounds, level‑gated feats, and a rules glossary for the 2024 PHB.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2022: Expert Classes
Contents: One D&D UA focusing on the Expert class group (Bard, Ranger, Rogue) with one subclass each, new/updated feats, and expanded rules glossary material for the 2024 PHB.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2022: Cleric & Revised Species
Contents: One D&D UA packet with revised Cleric class, species updates, and rules glossary adjustments for One D&D/2024 PHB development.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Druid & Paladin
Contents: One D&D UA packet revising Druid and Paladin classes, including wild shape changes, smite revisions, subclass progression, and glossary updates for the 2024 PHB.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Players Handbook Playtest 1
Contents: First numbered UA in the 2023 PHB series; revises character creation options, species, and core rules toward the 2024 PHB text.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Players Handbook Playtest 2
Contents: Second PHB playtest UA; focuses on classes and new weapon mastery system plus associated feats and glossary items for One D&D.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Players Handbook Playtest 3
Contents: Third PHB playtest UA; centers on Cleric and revised species along with core rule refinements for the 2024 ruleset.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Players Handbook Playtest 4
Contents: Fourth PHB playtest UA; adds Druid & Paladin revisions, subclass progression tuning, and significant rules‑glossary updates.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Players Handbook Playtest 5
Contents: Fifth PHB playtest UA; covers more 2024 PHB classes, spells, and feat changes, plus refinement of weapon mastery and spell‑list concepts.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Players Handbook Playtest 6
Contents: Sixth PHB playtest UA; continues class and feat iteration, locking in many structures used in the final 2024 PHB.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2023: Player’s Handbook Playtest 7
Contents: Community‑labeled PHB UA 7; further 2024 PHB refinements to classes, subclasses, and rules ahead of closing the playtest loop.
Source: (archived D&D Beyond UA 2023 packet; see https://www.dndbeyond.com/sources/dnd/ua index)

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2024: Player’s Handbook Playtest 8
Contents: Final major PHB‑focused UA for One D&D; features revised Barbarian, Druid, and Monk plus last‑round tuning for 2024 PHB classes and rules.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2024: The Artificer
Contents: Full Artificer class rework to align with the 2024 Player’s Handbook rules; updates core features (Magical Tinkering, Flash of Genius, Spell-Storing Item, Soul of Artifice) and revises all four subclasses (Alchemist, Armorer, Artillerist, Battle Smith).

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2025: Forgotten Realms Subclasses
Contents: Eight new Forgotten Realms–themed subclasses planned for a Forgotten Realms Player’s Guide, including options such as College of the Moon Bard, Oath of the Noble Genies Paladin, Winter Walker Ranger, Scion of the Three Rogue, Spellfire Sorcerer, and other Realms-linked subclass concepts.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2025: Updated Arcane Subclasses
Contents: UA packet updating and expanding several arcane subclasses such as Arcane Archer Fighter, multiple Wizard traditions (Enchanter, Necromancer, Transmuter, Conjurer), Tattooed Warrior-style Monk options, and related arcane subclass revisions for use with 2024 rules.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2025: Apocalyptic Subclasses
Contents: UA focused on ‘apocalyptic’ or Dark Sun–style subclasses, adding new options for Druid, Fighter, Sorcerer, and Warlock built around harsh-world themes, survival, and planar or defiling-style magic concepts.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2025: Arcane Subclasses Update
Contents: Update to the June 2025 Arcane Subclasses UA, revising six of the earlier arcane-focused subclasses. It provides new or reworked features for the Arcane Archer Fighter, Tattooed Warrior Monk, and the Enchanter, Necromancer, and Transmuter Wizard traditions, while dropping the Arcana Domain Cleric, Ancestral Sorcery Sorcerer, and Hexblade Warlock from this iteration.

Title: Unearthed Arcana 2025: Subclasses Update
Contents: Martial-focused UA packet updating five popular 5e subclasses from Xanathar’s Guide to Everything and the 2014 PHB. It revises Oathbreaker Paladin, Cavalier Fighter, Path of the Ancestral Guardian (renamed Path of the Spiritual Guardian Barbarian), Path of the Storm Herald Barbarian, and Way of the Drunken Master (renamed Warrior of Intoxication Monk), including changes to Oathbreaker’s Aura of Hate and spell list, always-on Unwavering Mark for Cavalier, expanded spirit options and crit-based rewards for Spiritual Guardian, scaling Storm Aura for Storm Herald, and new magical brews for the Monk subclass.
